Form_EditionIdentifier_A.tu: The edition identifier of the form including the form number and edition (the date is typically formatted YYYY/MM).

Policy_PolicyNumberIdentifier_A.tu: Enter identifier: The identifier assigned by the insurer to the policy, or submission, being referenced exactly as it appears on the policy, including prefix and suffix symbols.  If required for self-insurance, the self-insured license or contract number.

Policy_EffectiveDate_A.tu: Enter date: The effective date of the policy.  The date that the terms and conditions of the policy commence.  (MM/DD/YYYY)

Insurer_FullName_A.tu: Enter text: The insurer's full legal company name(s) as found in the file copy of the policy.  Use the actual name of the company within the group to which the policy has been issued.  This is not the insurer's group name or trade name.

NamedInsured_FullName_A.tu: Enter text: The named insured(s) as it / they will appear on the policy declarations page.

CrimeInformation_ChecksStampedCode_A.tu: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates if checks are stamped "For Deposit Only".

CrimeInformation_DepositFrequency_DailyI.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates deposits are made daily.

CrimeInformation_DepositFrequency_OtherI.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates deposits are made other than those frequencies listed.

CrimeInformation_DepositFrequencyCode_A.tu: Enter code: The frequency of deposits.

CrimeInformation_NightDepositoryUsedCode.tu: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates if a night depository is used.

CrimeInformation_AnnualGrossReceiptsAmou.tu: Enter amount: The annual gross sales or receipts for the last fiscal year

BuildingProtection_DoubleCylinderDoorLoc.tu: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the type of locks on the entry doors of the insured premises are double cylinder deadbolt door locks.

CrimeInformation_OtherDescription_A.tu:
Enter text: The description of any supplemental information such as police patrol, central shopping center guard
information, proprietary closed circuit television, etc.

SafeVault_ManufacturerFullName_A.tu: Enter text: The safe or vault manufacturer's name.

SafeVault_Label_ULIndicator_A.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the rating is based on Underwriters Laboratories, Inc. (UL).

SafeVault_Label_SMNAIndicator_A.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the rating is based on Safe Manufacturers National Association (SMNA).

SafeVault_ClassCode_A.tu: Enter code: The construction classification representing the extent of burglary protection for this safe or vault. Use the classification from the Burglary label and not the Fire label located on the safe or vault. For industry definitions of the classifications, refer to the Commercial Lines Manual.

SafeVault_DoorType_RoundIndicator_A.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the door is round.

SafeVault_DoorType_SquareIndicator_A.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the door is square.

SafeVault_CombinationLock_OuterIndicator.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if there are outer combination locks on the safe or vault.

SafeVault_CombinationLock_InnerIndicator.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if there are inner combination locks on the safe or vault.

SafeVault_CombinationLock_ChestIndicator.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if there are chest combination locks on the safe or vault.

SafeVault_DoorThickness_A.tu: Enter number: The door thickness in inches, excluding bolt work.

SafeVault_WallThickness_A.tu: Enter number: The wall thickness in inches.

SafeVault_ManufacturerFullName_B.tu: Enter text: The safe or vault manufacturer's name.

SafeVault_Label_ULIndicator_B.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the rating is based on Underwriters Laboratories, Inc. (UL).

SafeVault_Label_SMNAIndicator_B.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the rating is based on Safe Manufacturers National Association (SMNA).

SafeVault_ClassCode_B.tu: Enter code: The construction classification representing the extent of burglary protection for this safe or vault. Use the classification from the Burglary label and not the Fire label located on the safe or vault. For industry definitions of the classifications, refer to the Commercial Lines Manual.

SafeVault_DoorType_RoundIndicator_B.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the door is round.

SafeVault_DoorType_SquareIndicator_B.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the door is square.

SafeVault_CombinationLock_OuterIndicator.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if there are outer combination locks on the safe or vault.

SafeVault_CombinationLock_InnerIndicator.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if there are inner combination locks on the safe or vault.

SafeVault_CombinationLock_ChestIndicator.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if there are chest combination locks on the safe or vault.

SafeVault_DoorThickness_B.tu: Enter number: The door thickness in inches, excluding bolt work.

SafeVault_WallThickness_B.tu: Enter number: The wall thickness in inches.

MessengerProtection_MessengerCount_A.tu: Enter number: The number of messengers to which limits apply.

MessengerProtection_GuardCount_A.tu: Enter number: The number of guards assigned to work with each messenger.

MessengerProtection_ArmouredVehicleCount.tu: Enter number: The number of armored vehicles to which the limits apply.

MessengerProtection_PrivateConveyanceCod.tu:
Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicate if the messenger uses a car or truck provided for his/her exclusive use during the
entire trip.

MessengerProtection_SafetySatchelCode_A.tu:
Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicate if the insured's property is carried in an Underwriters Laboratories-approved
safety satchel (e.g., a key-locked bank depository bag or case with handcuffs).

Alarm_AlarmType_HoldUpIndicator_A.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the alarm type is a hold-up alarm.  A manual or semiautomatic control which can transmit an alarm in the event of a hold-up.

Alarm_AlarmType_PremisesIndicator_A.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the alarm type is a premises alarm.  A sensing device installed on premises which transmits an alarm in the event of unauthorized entry. The Premises Extent must be completed for Premises Alarms.

Alarm_AlarmType_SafeIndicator_A.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the alarm type is a safe / vault alarm.  A system that protects the safe or vault and is connected to an outside central station, gong or siren. The Extent of Protection for safe / vault must be completed.

Alarm_Burglar_LocalGongIndicator_A.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the burglar alarm sounds or appears outside the premises.

Alarm_Burglar_CentralStationIndicator_A.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the burglar alarm rings at an alarm company.

Alarm_Burglar_PoliceConnectIndicator_A.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if alarms (hold-up and burglar) are transmitted to police headquarters rather than to a private control station

Alarm_Burglar_WithKeysIndicator_A.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the alarm company, located off the insured's premises, has keys to the applicant's property.

Alarm_Burglar_GradeCode_A.tu: Enter code: The alarm system grade as described in the Underwriters Laboratories (UL) standard (i.e., AA, A, BB, B, CC and C) which indicates the time required to respond to a signal from the alarm system.

Alarm_Burglar_ProtectionExtentSafeVaultP.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the extent of protection for the safe / vault is partial and covers around the door only.

Alarm_Burglar_ProtectionExtentSafeVaultC.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the extent of protection for the safe / vault is complete and covers the sides, top walls, floor and ceiling.

Alarm_Burglar_ProtectionExtentPremisesOn.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the extent of protection for the premises is protection grade 1 as defined in the Underwriters Laboratories (UL) standard.

Alarm_Burglar_ProtectionExtentPremisesTw.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the extent of protection for the premises is protection grade 2 as defined in the Underwriters Laboratories (UL) standard.

Alarm_Burglar_ProtectionExtentPremisesTh.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the extent of protection for the premises is protection grade 3 as defined in the Underwriters Laboratories (UL) standard.

Alarm_Burglar_InstalledAndServicedByName.tu: Enter text: The name of the alarm company that installed and services the alarm.  Alarm companies often install, maintain, and service the system in addition to providing Central Station facilities.

BuildingSecurity_GuardCount_A.tu: Enter number: The number of guards within the premises or at its door during regular business hours.

BuildingSecurity_WatchpersonCount_A.tu: Enter number: The number of watchpersons on the premises during non-office hours.

BuildingSecurity_WatchpersonFactorCredit.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the watchpersons report to a central station on an hourly basis.
Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the watchpersons register hourly with an approved watchperson's clock (Detex Time Clock, etc.).
Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the watchpersons do not do any type of reporting or registering.

Alarm_Burglar_CertificateIdentifier_A.tu: Enter identifier: The Underwriters Laboratories or other testing organization Certificate Number, if applicable. Attach a copy of the certificate to the application.

Alarm_Burglar_CertificateExpirationDate_.tu: Enter date: The expiration date of the certificate.  (MM/DD/YYYY) As used here, this is the expiration date of the UL certificate.

BuildingSecurity_AccessibleOpeningsDescr.tu: Enter text: The information regarding access to the premises. Indicate number of doors and if they are protected. Indicate what type of locks are used, and if there is a gate or bars.

BuildingSecurity_OtherProtectionDescript.tu: Enter text: The description of other protective measures or devices (e.g., if windows have steel grates and are connected to an alarm). Indicate if the building has skylights and if windows are visible from the street.

CrimeLineOfBusiness_RemarkText_A.tu: Enter text: The general remarks for the Crime line of business.

Producer_AuthorizedRepresentative_Signat.tu: Sign here: Accommodates the signature of the authorized representative (e.g., producer, agent, broker, etc.) of the company(ies) listed on the document.  This is required in most states.

Producer_AuthorizedRepresentative_FullNa.tu: Enter text: The name of the authorized representative of the producer, agency and/or broker that signed the form.

Producer_StateLicenseIdentifier_A.tu: Enter identifier: The State License Number of the producer.

NamedInsured_Signature_A.tu: Sign here: Accommodates the signature of the applicant or named insured.

NamedInsured_SignatureDate_A.tu: Enter date: The date the form was signed by the applicant or named insured.  (MM/DD/YYYY)

Producer_NationalIdentifier_A.tu: Enter identifier: The National Producer Number (NPN) as defined in the National Insurance Producer Registry (NIPR).  Note: The NPN is not the same as the producer state license number.
